tasks.label: 2. Deploy & Run (Fast)
tasks.command: cd ${workspaceFolder} && ssh root@192.168.0.10 'killall -9 ${workspaceFolderBasename} || true' && scp ${workspaceFolderBasename} root@192.168.0.10:/home/root/ && ssh root@192.168.0.10 'chmod +x /home/root/${workspaceFolderBasename} && /home/root/${workspaceFolderBasename}'

tasks.label: 3. Build, Deploy & Run (Full Step)
tasks.command: cd ${workspaceFolder} && source ~/myir_sdk/environment-setup-cortexa35-ostl-linux && make clean all && ssh root@192.168.0.10 'killall -9 ${workspaceFolderBasename} || true' && scp ${workspaceFolderBasename} root@192.168.0.10:/home/root/ && ssh root@192.168.0.10 'chmod +x /home/root/${workspaceFolderBasename} && /home/root/${workspaceFolderBasename}'

tasks.label: 5. Build & Run with ZFDevLib
tasks.command: cd ${workspaceFolder} && if [ -d 'ZFA35DevLib' ]; then echo 'Core: Rebuilding...'; source ~/myir_sdk/environment-setup-cortexa35-ostl-linux && make -C ZFA35DevLib clean all && make clean all && ssh root@192.168.0.10 'killall -9 ${workspaceFolderBasename} || true' && scp ${workspaceFolderBasename} root@192.168.0.10:/home/root/ && ssh root@192.168.0.10 'chmod +x /home/root/${workspaceFolderBasename} && /home/root/${workspaceFolderBasename}'; else echo 'Error: Source not found.'; exit 1; fi
